title: 有馬記念の後に・極上のいいこいいこ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Enthusiastic cheers usher in Super Creek's
conquest of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the race, Super Creek rewards me by
gleefully praising me as a way of expressing her
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a flood of emotions, she holds me in a tight
embrace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Through her care, I've become a top-class trainer.
